description:
___

### [choco://partition-assistant-standard](choco://partition-assistant-standard)
To use choco:// protocol URLs, install [(unofficial) choco:// Protocol support ](https://chocolatey.org/packages/choco-protocol-support)
___
AOMEI Partition Assistant Standard allows you to realize disk upgrade/replacement, partition style conversion, OS migration and other disk managements without any difficulties.
___
**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/kenscudero/partition-assistant-standard/blob/main/README.md)**
___
